phases.label: Initial outreach
phases.done_when: The reviewed inbound-lead draft has been sent through the sandbox email tool and a first follow-up has been scheduled.

goals.description: Send the draft produced by the lead-intelligence pipeline through the sandbox email tool.
Create the first follow-up wake-up after the initial email.

phases.label: Reply qualification
phases.done_when: An inbound reply has been captured and categorized for next best action.

goals.description: Record the inbound email and preserve enough context for the next worker step.
Classify whether the reply is meeting-ready, a question, an objection, or not interested.

phases.label: Objection or follow-up
phases.done_when: The worker has responded to a non-terminal reply or scheduled the next cadence touch.

goals.description: Use sandbox email for a short response when there is an inbound reply, otherwise wait for the scheduled follow-up.

phases.label: Meeting handoff
phases.done_when: The lead is marked ready for SDR handoff after meeting-ready intent appears.

goals.description: Mark the case ready for human SDR handoff.

phases.label: Closed outcome
phases.done_when: The worker case has reached a terminal state such as meeting-ready, no-response, disqualified, paused, or failed.

goals.description: Persist the final worker outcome for SDR review.
